---
title: "Multi-model Prompt Testing using LangChain"
author: "Trey Saddler"
date: "2024-04-02"
execute: 
  eval: false
---

## Notes

- [LangChain Docs | Azure OpenAI](https://python.langchain.com/docs/integrations/text_embedding/azureopenai)
- [LangChain Docs | Model Comparison](https://python.langchain.com/docs/guides/model_laboratory)

```{python}
import os
from dotenv import find_dotenv, load_dotenv
from langchain.model_laboratory import ModelLaboratory
from langchain_core.prompts import PromptTemplate
from langchain_openai import AzureOpenAI
```

```{python}
# Import config from .env file
load_dotenv(find_dotenv())
```

```{python}
AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY = os.getenv("EASTUS2_API_KEY")
AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT = os.getenv("AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT")
OPENAI_API_VERSION = os.getenv("OPENAI_API_VERSION")
```

```{python}
# Initialize the Azure OpenAI model
llms = [
    AzureOpenAI(api_key=AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY, azure_fendpoint=AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT),
]
```
